title: Najrīj Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Najrīj with a Z-Score of +3.83. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Najrīj is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 12.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 31%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is at 19.3 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) value is 0.0 GG, indicating no need for heating during this period.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Najrīj.
